input.command:
cd /home/nick/work/picolibc_agentic && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
libm/riscv/test: add EN_PERF benchmarking support to all test harnesses

Add perf() function and #ifdef EN_PERF guards to all 60 remaining test
files, following the pattern established in test_sin.c and test_cosf.c.
Each file now supports -DEN_PERF to run cycle-count benchmarks via the
Makefile bench-* targets instead of accuracy tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
